name: minimax-openai
description: Project-scoped droid config for Minimax OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Contains OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_API_KEY (user requested to store secret in repo).
example_usage: This droid provides environment variables for tools that read OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_API_KEY. Storing secrets in repository is a security risk; rotate the key if this repo is shared.
